message:
chore(ci): add dependabot configuration

Configure Dependabot for automated dependency updates:
- Cargo dependencies (weekly)
- GitHub Actions (weekly)

Both use conventional commit prefixes (chore(deps), chore(ci)) and
have reasonable PR limits to avoid overwhelming the maintainer.

Closes #7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+version: 2
+updates:
+  - package-ecosystem: "cargo"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "chore(deps)"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 5
+
+  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "chore(ci)"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 3
